description: Tempdoc 561 surface tier — the placement-keyed one-interaction-window invariant. At most ONE visible (USER-audience, RAIL/STAGE) surface may consume a core user-interaction shape, and that surface is the canonical one window; DEEPLINK surfaces route into it (exempt). The authority for the core interaction-shape set is CoreConversationShapeCatalog.CORE_USER_INTERACTION_SHAPES (Java); this gate projects it and forbids a second visible interaction surface or a second per-shape FE view.

scan.expectedMinPopulationNote: tempdoc 576 §5 vacuous-pass floor: the core interaction-shape set parsed from the shape catalog must be >= this many (the size-0 case is the verdictForEmptyCoreSet hard-stop). Live count is 5 (2026-06-15); floor 3 catches a parser-breaking refactor that drops most shapes. Lower with any change that legitimately shrinks the core shape set.
